name: Cabbage Orzo & Sausage Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown sausage in oil in a large nonstick saucepan over medium-high heat until browned but not cooked through. Remove sausage and cut into 16 pieces.
2. Reduce heat to medium. Add onion, carrot, and garlic to the saucepan; sauté for 3 minutes to soften. Gradually add water, broth, tomatoes, cabbage, basil, and thyme, breaking up tomatoes. Simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
3. Add orzo and sausage; simmer, covered, for an additional 10 minutes until sausage is cooked and orzo is tender. Season with salt and pepper.
